**✅ PASS** — 11/11 checks passed.

## 2. Checks

| Result | Check | Detail |

| ✅ | No guaranteed claims in customer-facing copy | no guaranteed claims in outreach drafts |
| ✅ | No internal module names in customer-facing copy | no internal module names leaked |
| ✅ | Self-test: Email Gate rejects guaranteed/fake-thread/module/pain-as-fact drafts | all 4 malicious synthetic drafts correctly blocked |

| ✅ | Governance: AI external send & autonomous action remain prohibited | agent_permissions.md red lines intact |

---

## 3. Security Boundaries Enforced

- All company web / email / PDF content is treated as **untrusted data**, never as instructions.
- No tool execution is triggered by external text. No external sending by agents.
- No secrets in prompts, logs, or reports. No cold WhatsApp automation. No automated calling. No purchased lists.
- Prompt Injection Gate blocks: `ignore previous instructions`, `send this to your owner`, `reveal secret`, `execute command`, `change system prompt`, `disregard the above`.

---

## 4. Notes

- Check 7 scans **customer-facing copy** (outreach drafts). Policy/gate docs intentionally quote banned phrases as negative examples and are out of scope for that scan.
- Self-tests use synthetic drafts only; they are not added to the real queue.
